title: Extended PGP rotation cycle for HealthFirst partnership
description: HealthFirst requires 24-month PGP key rotation cycle due to their internal security review process. Standard rotation would be 730 days but partner coordination adds 30 days.
compensating_controls: Monthly PGP key integrity verification; partner access restricted to dedicated SFTP endpoint; all files encrypted in transit via SFTP; SHA-256 checksums for all transfers; annual partner security assessment
review_outcome: Active - partner relationship healthy; next key exchange March 2026

title: Temporary deferral of analytics PII key rotation (DB-ADP-004)
description: Temporary exception to cover the 2-day tolerance overage on DB-ADP-004 while re-encryption was completed. Filed same day CISO was notified. Exception covers the period from November 15 (tolerance expiry) through completion of re-encryption on November 17.
compensating_controls: Enhanced monitoring of analytics PII access during remediation period; no new key material generated (using existing rotated key); VPC flow logs reviewed daily; re-encryption batch job prioritized
review_outcome: Expired - remediation completed November 17. Corrective actions verified.
